title:
Lesson 1:
Don't Forget / I Forgot
description: 'Unutma' = Don't forget. 'Unuttum' = I forgot. 'Tamamen unuttum' = I completely forgot. The verb 'unutmak' = to forget. Very useful in daily reminders and apologies.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Don't forget to bring the document tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Okay, I'm writing it down right now.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Did you call the doctor today?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Oh, I completely forgot. I'm calling now.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Did you also forget the Monday meeting?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Onu da unuttum. Bir takvime ihtiyacım var.
dialogue.english: I forgot that too. I need a calendar.
